qa_pair.question: Send a message "Hello John" to the phone number 214-212-5050
Search for a contact named "John" and get their phone number
qa_pair.answer: Search returns contacts with "John" in their name with associated phone numbers and emails

qa_pair.question: Send the text "Meeting at 3pm" to a contact using their email address format (test@example.com)
Format a phone number in different ways and send "Test message" to: (214) 212-5050
Search for contacts containing the phone number "214-212-5050" in their profile
qa_pair.answer: Search returns any contacts that have this phone number

qa_pair.question: Send a message with special characters: "Hello! Can you help? @John #urgent $important" to 214-702-3999
Send a multi-line message with newlines to 214-212-5050: "Line 1\nLine 2\nLine 3"
Search for a contact using a phone number format with country code: "+12142125050"
qa_pair.answer: Search returns contacts matching the phone number

qa_pair.question: Send a message to a phone number that requires normalization from format "2142125050" (no formatting)
Search for contacts by partial email match to find contacts with email addresses from a specific domain
qa_pair.answer: Search returns contacts whose emails contain the search term
